title: Opening for Hotel Manager at OYO Rooms

jsonLd.title: Opening for Hotel Manager at OYO Rooms
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Hotel Manager with drive and ambition, OYO Rooms in Rajkot is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About OYO Rooms:
OYO Rooms is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in Customer Relations
• Proficiency in Food Safety
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in Opera PMS

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with OYO Rooms!
